Figure 3. Performance of de novo variant calling across different pipelines and sequencing depths. (Top) Recall (left) and precision (right) for de novo variants (child 0/1, parents 0/0 ) on chromosome 20 (HG002) as a function of sequencing coverage. (Bottom) Breakdown of call accuracy (True Positives (TP), False Negatives (FN), and False Positives (FP)) by read depth for trio-aware pipelines (DeepTrio, GATK4, and Octopus) on Illumina WGS data. De novo sites are defined using Genome in a Bottle (GIAB) v4.2.1 benchmarks. DeepTrio demonstrates superior performance, particularly maintaining higher recall at lower read depths compared to GATK4 and Octopus.
